# Test apx inspect and explain commands

# --- inspect identity (basic) ---
exec apx inspect identity proto/payments/ledger/v1 --source-repo github.com/acme/apis
stdout 'API:        proto/payments/ledger/v1'
stdout 'Format:     proto'
stdout 'Domain:     payments'
stdout 'Name:       ledger'
stdout 'Line:       v1'
stdout 'Go module:  github.com/acme/apis/proto/payments/ledger'
stdout 'Go import:  github.com/acme/apis/proto/payments/ledger/v1'

# --- inspect identity with lifecycle ---
exec apx inspect identity proto/payments/ledger/v1 --source-repo github.com/acme/apis --lifecycle beta
stdout 'Lifecycle:  beta'

# --- inspect identity v2 ---
exec apx inspect identity proto/payments/ledger/v2 --source-repo github.com/acme/apis
stdout 'Go module:  github.com/acme/apis/proto/payments/ledger/v2'
stdout 'Go import:  github.com/acme/apis/proto/payments/ledger/v2'

# --- inspect identity JSON output ---
exec apx --json inspect identity proto/payments/ledger/v1 --source-repo github.com/acme/apis
stdout '"id": "proto/payments/ledger/v1"'
stdout '"format": "proto"'
stdout '"module": "github.com/acme/apis/proto/payments/ledger"'

# --- inspect release ---
exec apx inspect release proto/payments/ledger/v1@v1.0.0-beta.1 --source-repo github.com/acme/apis
stdout 'API:        proto/payments/ledger/v1'
stdout 'Release:    v1.0.0-beta.1'
stdout 'Tag:        proto/payments/ledger/v1/v1.0.0-beta.1'
stdout 'Lifecycle:  beta'

# --- inspect release GA (no lifecycle inferred) ---
exec apx inspect release proto/payments/ledger/v1@v1.0.0 --source-repo github.com/acme/apis
stdout 'Release:    v1.0.0'
stdout 'Tag:        proto/payments/ledger/v1/v1.0.0'

# --- inspect release JSON ---
exec apx --json inspect release proto/payments/ledger/v1@v1.0.0-beta.1 --source-repo github.com/acme/apis
stdout '"tag": "proto/payments/ledger/v1/v1.0.0-beta.1"'

# --- inspect release bad format ---
! exec apx inspect release proto/payments/ledger/v1
stderr 'expected format'

# --- inspect identity bad api-id ---
! exec apx inspect identity proto/payments
stderr 'invalid API ID'

# --- explain go-path v1 ---
exec apx explain go-path proto/payments/ledger/v1 --source-repo github.com/acme/apis
stdout 'github.com/acme/apis/proto/payments/ledger'
stdout 'github.com/acme/apis/proto/payments/ledger/v1'
stdout 'no version suffix'

# --- explain go-path v2 ---
exec apx explain go-path proto/payments/ledger/v2 --source-repo github.com/acme/apis
stdout 'github.com/acme/apis/proto/payments/ledger/v2'
stdout '/v2 suffix'

# --- explain go-path JSON ---
exec apx --json explain go-path proto/payments/ledger/v1 --source-repo github.com/acme/apis
stdout '"go_module": "github.com/acme/apis/proto/payments/ledger"'
stdout '"go_import": "github.com/acme/apis/proto/payments/ledger/v1"'

# --- explain go-path bad api-id ---
! exec apx explain go-path invalid
stderr 'invalid API ID'
